title: rosa × collina var. urbica
intro: Rosa × collina var. urbica, also known as the wild rose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. The health benefits of Rosa × collina var. urbica include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and sore throats. Rosa × collina var. urbica can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
